title: Breaking It Gently
content:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ All was up with Richard Tanner 
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Wait-a-Bitן¿½ we called him. Dead?
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Yes. The braceman dropped a spanner,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Landed Richard on the head;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Cracked his skull, sir, like a teacup,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Down the pump-shaft in the well.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Braceman hadnן¿½t time to speak up,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Tanner never knew what fell.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Tell the widow? Whoן¿½d go through it?
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ No one on the shift would stir;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ But Pat Ryan said heן¿½d do it 
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Nately break the news to her.ן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Patן¿½s a splitter, and a kinder
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Heart I never wish to know.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Stephens told him where to find her,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Begged him gently deal the blow.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ In a very solemn manner
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Ryan met the dead manן¿½s wife 
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Morninן¿½ to yez, Widdy Tanner!ן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Says he gravely, ן¿½Such is life!ן¿½
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Iן¿½m no widow!ן¿½ says she, prying
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ For the joke in Ryanן¿½s eye.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½ן¿½Scuse me, mum,ן¿½ says Paddy, sighing,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½ן¿½Scuse me, mum, but thatן¿½s a lie.ן¿½

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½That remark would be repented
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ If Dick Tanner heard,ן¿½ says she.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Meaninן¿½, mum, the late lamented
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Party av that name?ן¿½ says he.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Still the widow missed the notion,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Wonder only filled her eye;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ So Pat smothered his emotion,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Gulped, and had another try.

ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½ן¿½Tis like this, ye see, me honey,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Iן¿½ve been sint tן¿½ let ye know
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Yeן¿½ve inherited some money 
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Twilve ן¿½r fifteen pounds ן¿½r so.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Through a schame av Providenceן¿½s,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Which no mortal man could dodge;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Poor Dickן¿½s funeral expenses
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Have fell due, mum, at the lodge!ן¿½
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Dyson represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance, inviting the reader to reflect on the deeper themes of human experience and artistic expression.

In the broader context of Edward Dyson's bibliography, these specific lines stand out for their clarity and poignancy. Whether you are searching for inspiration or a moment of quiet contemplation, this work offers a timeless perspective that transcends its original era.

At Linespedia, we have curated this specific poem to ensure it reaches a modern audience. We recommend sharing these lines as a digital poster or using them as a thoughtful caption to connect with others who appreciate the enduring beauty of verse.
